correctness.reason: DDR3 calibration did not assert calib_complete in this run; this experiment was an observability gate, not a user-port data-integrity test.

route.timing: pass at the 25 MHz openXC7 route target

notes: Packed debug1 proves UberDDR3 is no longer stuck at READ_DATA/state 12; it reaches BURST_WRITE/state 17.
With BIST_MODE=1, BURST_WRITE is part of a full-address-space built-in BIST, so this result points to using calibration-only or bounded BIST for fast DDR3 bring-up.
